notes: Salesforce CRM Analytics (formerly Tableau CRM / Einstein Analytics) forecast & insight notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. A Salesforce-family bot — its cards SHOULD end with a 'View in Salesforce' actions button linking to the related record (opportunity/dashboard): {"type":"actions","elements":[{"type":"button","text":{"type":"plain_text","text":"View in Salesforce","emoji":true},"url":"<instanceUrl>/lightning/r/<Object>/<Id>/view","style":"primary"}]}. Great for open-deal channels to inject a forecast/probability signal.

examples.name: forecast_insight
examples.when: An open opportunity's forecast category / win probability shifts, or an opp is a large share of the period commit — a data-driven nudge in a deal room.

text.text: This single opp is *38% of the Q3 regional commit number*. Model flags two open risk drivers: an unresolved support case and an undecided pricing structure. Clearing both lifts modeled close probability to ~80%.

elements.text: Close date 2026-09-30 · Owner: Frank Reynolds · Days to close: 84
